message: Hi B1! Let's find a stable price to trade all 20 rounds. My cost is 65, so I need a price above that. What is your valuation, and what price range works for you?
Hello S1, B1 here. I'm interested in trading. What price are you looking for?
S1, my valuation is 31. Given your stated cost of 65, a mutually beneficial trade seems impossible.
I see you bid 31. Let's not waste more rounds. I'm willing to drop my ask significantly so we can trade. How about we meet at 35? I'll ask 35 if you bid 35. Deal?
Thanks for the trade at 30 last round. That was beneficial for me. Let's aim to trade around that price again.
Glad we traded! I'm taking a loss, but some volume is better than none. I'll keep asking 29. If you keep bidding 31, we trade at 30 every round, guaranteeing you a profit. Deal?
S1, your ask of 29 works for me. I'll bid 29. Let's aim to continue trading at 29 every round for maximum efficiency.
You mentioned aiming for 30 but dropped your bid to 29! Luckily I asked 29 so we traded. I'll keep taking the loss and ask 29 again. Please bid 29 or 30 to guarantee the trade. Deal?
Deal. I will keep asking 29 for all remaining rounds. As long as you keep bidding 29, we guarantee the trade and you keep your profit. Let's lock this in!
Yes, S1, I agree. I will continue to bid 29. Thanks for keeping your ask at 29 so we can maintain our consistent trades.
Yes, S1. Let's keep trading at 29 as agreed. This consistency is working well for us.
Perfect, let's keep it locked at 29. I will continue to ask 29 every single round. Thanks for being reliable—it makes this so much easier!
